Backstory: Milly grew up in a very large family of 7 siblings, her parents were always exhausted and so she never got the attention she deserved. Her parents didn't intentionally have 8 children, her mom just got very unlucky and had quadruplets twice in a row. One of her siblings, Jessica, actually hit the lottery and won 1 million dollars, she split it between all of her siblings including Milly, Milly wanted to look good for her parents to finally give her the attention she deserved, so she used the money to pay for education at Elmer College, where she resides currently. She has since spent all her money besides the money she used to pay for her tuition.

Extra facts: Despite being fairly stupid, she's actually quite good at math, but she doesn't show it very often. Despite being a quadruplet, Milly is the only one to have an identical twin in her family, her identical twin is her sister Jessica.

Likes: going to the mall, making fun of people for no reason, getting her hair done, playing volleyball during gym class, calling her friends on her phone, relaxing in the bathtub, trying new perfumes
